overall.description: First-person perspective gameplay footage from a video game set in a historic library, likely Hogwarts Legacy. The player character is seated at a wooden desk examining ancient books and parchment, then looks around a dimly lit gothic library with green banker's lamps, towering bookshelves, and other students studying in the background.

agents.ego_description: examining an open ancient book and loose parchment on the desk, moving hands over the pages and adjusting their position

entered.detail: large leather-bound book opened to text-filled pages with illuminated script
single sheet of aged paper with handwritten text placed next to the open book
thick dark leather-bound book stacked on the desk surface
dark leather surface covering the desk with decorative tooling
decorative metal rivets lining the edge of the desk surface

segments.scene_description: The player is seated at a dark wooden desk in a library, closely examining an open ancient book and a loose piece of parchment. The desk features decorative brass studded trim and additional closed books stacked nearby, all illuminated by warm overhead lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic library reading room with tall bookshelves

events.description: camera lifts from desk to reveal the expansive library interior and a robed figure in the background

agents.ego_description: looking up from the desk to survey the surrounding library space and architecture

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing near a wooden table in the background, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling wooden bookshelves filled with books extending up to the vaulted ceiling
dark-robed character standing near a table in the library aisle
thick wooden pillar supporting the library ceiling structure
large wall hanging with intricate patterns depicting a scene
rolling wooden ladder leaning against the tall bookshelves

segments.scene_description: The camera lifts from the desk to reveal a vast historic library with floor-to-ceiling wooden bookshelves lining the walls. A robed figure stands near a table in the background, while a large decorative tapestry hangs on the right wall and a wooden ladder leans against the shelves.

scene_state.functional_zone: library reading room with green lamps and study carrels

events.description: camera pans left to reveal more of the library interior including distinctive green desk lamps

agents.ego_description: panning left to observe the library interior, bookshelves, and other students studying

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting at a desk across the table, studying intently

entered.detail: brass banker's lamp with distinctive green glass shade illuminating the desk
student character seated at a desk surrounded by stacks of books
gothic stone archway leading to another section of the library

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left across the library, revealing green-shaded brass banker's lamps illuminating the wooden desks. Another student is visible studying in the background near tall bookshelves and a stone archway, while the warm lighting creates a cozy atmosphere.

events.description: camera returns to focus on the desk, open book, and parchment
camera briefly looks up from the book toward the other student across the table

agents.ego_description: reading the open book and handling the loose parchment with hands, occasionally looking up toward the other student

notable_agents.action: student studying at the opposite desk, visible when the camera looks up at the end

entered.detail: large leather-bound book opened to text-filled pages
single sheet of aged paper with handwritten text
thick dark leather-bound book on the desk

segments.scene_description: The view returns to the desk where the player continues reading the ancient book and examining the parchment. The camera remains focused on the desk surface for an extended period, with hands occasionally turning pages or adjusting the paper, before looking up at the end to show the other student studying across the table.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with an intimate focus on ancient texts before expanding to reveal the vast scale of a gothic library. It begins with a close-up view of an open book and parchment on a brass-studded wooden desk under warm overhead lighting. As the camera lifts, the view opens up to a grand hall of floor-to-ceiling bookshelves, featuring a robed figure and a large decorative tapestry. The perspective then pans left to showcase green-shaded banker's lamps illuminating study desks and a student working near a stone archway, before shifting back down to the original desk. Finally, the camera lingers on the act of turning pages and adjusting the parchment before looking up one last time to acknowledge the other student studying across the table.
